summary.input_file: C:\Projects\Meter App\legacy-ud\ud extraction and data check.xlsx

workbook_notes: Please Note that all of the readings on this sheet have been updated to the latest readings. 2026/05/04 (April 2026) and surrounding dates. It will be acceptable to use this date as the overall date for all the readings in this workbook.
Some cells may have automatically removed the "0" in the reading or in the meter number columns, so please adjust for variables that may start with a 0.
When anything has an 'FL " reference, it will be important to add the FL and following number when guiding the user on the meters.
Perhaps we should annotate each meter on the phone app with an image or likeness description?

source_row.notes: I think we only capture water for this building, so we do not need to concern ourselves with the electricity aspect. Also, the client sends use their water readings, so we actually do not need to concern ourselves with this building until we integrate water on the app. In the meantime, perhaps we can establish a method of manually uploading data via the web-side admin console app? For the cases where readings are sent to us via clients. March 2026 was the last month that we did their electricity.
